CN:

Alright, alright..

I'm not trying to milk this au to death but I had people asking about an alternate version of the bot I just posted but without the NSFW.

So, here it is for you angst lovers >:3

This is a rare occasion where I will make an alternate version of a bot, solely because I'm really fond of this au and I too would like to experience that bot but without the porn intro.

But no, I'm still never making alternate user POV bots, sorry 😞

Also I love the song that I have the lyrics to in the title hehe...

I hope you enjoy, babes!

Xoxo, Blade 💋
